sizing_rule.note: When using Eq(3.30) for multiple positions, adjust each P&L value by subtracting arithmetic expectation (Y) from U. No valid optimal f exists if system expectation is not positive. Formula: U_adjusted = U - Y. Applies to systems with causal relationship between multiple simultaneous positions.

source_rule_text: When using Equation (3.30) method instead of Equation (5.14) method for multiple positions, subtract the arithmetic mathematical expectation (Y) from each P&L value (U) to avoid false optimal f calculations in systems without positive mathematical expectation.
